The Founder Journey

One builder.
An expanding ecosystem.

Year by Year

A timeline of building.

Auto-scrolling — hover to pause · drag to explore

2017

Foundation Started

Xorix Solutions foundation phase begins — building a brand focused on financial services & trading education. The “Build Yourself” vision is born.

2018

Learning & Market Experience

A deep learning phase in the markets — mastering trading psychology, risk management and investing, and shaping an education-first approach for retail traders.

2019

Trading Mentor Identity

Begins explaining trading strategies and sharing practical market knowledge with beginners — building an audience through finance-awareness content.

2020

Online Presence Growth

Personal branding strengthens — consistent content on trading mindset, investing discipline and wealth creation, and the start of an online trading community.

2021

Financial Education Expansion

The Xoduse trading / education ecosystem expands — mentorship and investor-awareness sessions begin. Recognised as a financial-literacy mentor.

2022

Personal Brand Recognition

“Trading is an art” goes viral — recognised as an active finance creator on LinkedIn, with strong follower growth through wealth-mindset content.

2023

Educational Content Leadership

Publishing on market orders, trading psychology and investment discipline — the mentor & mindset-coach identity grows stronger with consistent investor-focused content.

2024

Community & Influence Growth

Visibility rises across the Chennai trading community — building authority in portfolio management & wealth creation, with a more structured education ecosystem.

2025

Official Business Expansion

Xorix Solutions LLP is officially incorporated with a strengthened leadership structure — stepping into the Designated Partner role and scaling mentorship.

2026

Large-Scale Investor Awareness

Key leadership presence at South India’s largest Investor Awareness Conclave 2026 — collaborating with title sponsor Enrich Money to create large-scale finance-awareness impact.

NEXT

The journey continues

New ventures incubating — the ecosystem keeps expanding into its next decade.

Inside the Ecosystem

People, sessions and stages.

The Ecosystem

Not a company.
A constellation.

One ecosystem, six pillars — each independent in operation, connected in purpose. New ventures simply plug in as the ecosystem grows.

Education 2 Entities
  • Learning Collective Community-driven learning platform
  • Knowledge Hub Essays & frameworks, openly shared
Media 2 Entities
  • Media Network228K average reach · 195K monthly views
  • Press & FeaturesInterviews, keynotes, podcasts
Community 1 Entity
  • Builders Community20K+ entrepreneurs & creators learning together
Ventures 2 Entities
  • Venture StudioDesigning & launching new businesses
  • New VenturesPlug-and-play — added as they launch
Services 3 Entities
  • Strategy & AdvisoryGuidance for founders & organizations
  • Venture BuildingFrom idea to operating company
  • Media & DistributionAudience & brand storytelling
Future 3 Entities
  • Project MeridianSealed initiative · CR-07
  • Project LumenSealed initiative · CR-08
  • Project AtlasSealed initiative · CR-09
Ventures

Built to compound.

Each venture is independent in operation, connected in purpose — sharing audience, infrastructure and strategy across the ecosystem.

Active · Education

Learning Collective

A modern education platform turning practical business knowledge into structured, community-driven learning experiences.

Scaling · Media

Media Network

A multi-channel media engine reaching 228K people on average — turning ideas into influence and audiences into communities.

Active · Community

Builders Community

A 20K+ member network of entrepreneurs, creators and operators learning, collaborating and launching together.

Incubating · Technology

Venture Studio

An internal studio where new businesses are designed, validated and launched — powered by the ecosystem's shared infrastructure.

Essay · Strategy

Why connected ventures compound — and isolated ones plateau
